notes: Fixes 'first long press doesn't open power-off, second one does'. The confirm screen was being entered and immediately cancelled by a stray touch gesture from the same frame. Power-off entry now clears any pending short-press flag and pending touch gesture, and the confirm screen ignores taps for the first 300 ms after opening. Also: settings menu (MENU + sub-pages) runs at 10 Hz instead of 5 Hz — taps no longer feel laggy. Button progress bar also runs at 15 Hz while held so the fill animation looks smooth.
